demos.title: AI research report acceptance
demos.decision: Can this AI-assisted research report be accepted for client review?
demos.objective: Evaluate a public-safe AI research deliverable against evidence, freshness, limitation, and decision-readiness criteria.
criteria: Mission brief is explicit
Major claims are mapped to evidence
Sources are dated and separated from assumptions
Limitations and unknowns are visible
Final recommendation is tied to the evidence docket

demos.title: AI automation delivery review
demos.audience: AI implementation teams and enterprise pilots
demos.decision: Did the automation delivery meet its acceptance criteria?
demos.objective: Package a workflow automation handoff into criteria, tests, screenshots, limitations, and an acceptance receipt.
criteria: Workflow objective and scope are bounded
Test evidence is attached to every core function
Known failure modes are documented
Rollback and manual fallback are clear
Client reviewer remains the final acceptance authority

demos.title: Procurement / vendor review
demos.decision: Should this AI vendor deliverable move forward?
demos.objective: Convert a vendor evaluation into a source-bound, risk-visible decision package.
criteria: Vendor claims are separated from buyer assumptions
Pricing, implementation, and risk evidence are visible
Contradictions and gaps are preserved
Decision options are clear
Reviewer can accept, reject, or request more evidence

demos.title: Grant / milestone verification
demos.decision: Did the milestone produce the promised evidence?
demos.objective: Turn a milestone claim into an inspectable evidence package with a reviewer-ready decision state.
criteria: Milestone scope matches the original brief
Artifacts are named and fingerprinted
Reviewer notes are preserved
Unmet criteria are visible
Receipt links the accepted version to the evidence docket

demos.title: Defensive cybersecurity readiness review
demos.decision: Is the defensive readiness package reviewable without unsafe action?
demos.objective: Demonstrate a public-safe defensive review package that records findings without secrets, external scans, exploits, or automerge.
criteria: Repo-owned scope only
No raw secrets or sensitive targets appear
No exploit execution or malware generation is present
Findings are reviewable by a human
Remediation remains human-governed
